---
name: Feature request (user story)
about: Suggest a new feature or task for GIRA
title: "[FEAT]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### User Story
**As a** [Role - e.g., Student, Professor, Space Manager, Admin]
**I want to** [perform an action]
**So that** [I can derive some value or benefit from this action]

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1 (e.g., The system must validate X before saving)
- [ ] Criterion 2 (e.g., An error message should appear if Y fails)
- [ ] UI/UX check (e.g., Must use Toast for success message)

### Context / References
Screenshots, documentation, or related Issues.
